prompt: Create a workflow that receives an HTTP POST at /orders with order data. Route the order based on its type: "subscription" orders go through a recurring billing setup, "one-time" orders go through direct payment processing, and "trial" orders skip payment and create a trial account. Each path returns a different confirmation message.

checklist.item: Branches into three paths based on order type field
Has a dedicated path for 'subscription' order type that handles recurring billing setup
Has a dedicated path for 'one-time' order type that handles direct payment processing
Has a dedicated path for 'trial' order type that skips payment and creates a trial account
Routing condition reads the order type field from the incoming POST body
Subscription path returns a confirmation message specific to recurring billing
One-time path returns a confirmation message specific to direct payment
Trial path returns a confirmation message specific to trial account creation
Each of the three paths terminates with an HTTP response returning its respective confirmation message
